reasons: Diggie reduces the value of Khufra's engage by protecting allies during the crowd-control window.
Khufra depends on converting engage into team follow-up, while Diggie disrupts that conversion.

proof.summary: Khufra wants to start fights with crowd control, while Diggie can remove debuffs and grant control immunity to nearby allies.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves ultimate for Khufra's real engage.
Diggie positions near the teammates Khufra wants to catch.
failureCases: Khufra baits Time Journey before the real engage.

reasons: Valir can push Khufra away before Khufra finishes a clean engage.
Valir's range and spacing tools make it harder for Khufra to reach priority targets.

proof.summary: Khufra wants to force close-range engage, while Valir can poke and knock him back to deny the start of the fight.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves knockback for Khufra's real engage.
Valir stays behind frontline and avoids blind corridors.
failureCases: Khufra engages from fog before Valir reacts.

reasons: Karrie pressures Khufra's tank durability through true damage based on Max HP.
She works best when she can hit Khufra safely without being caught by his engage.

proof.summary: Khufra wants to absorb pressure as a frontline tank, while Karrie's true-damage Max HP stacks punish durable targets.
worksBestWhen: Karrie has peel and keeps distance from Khufra's engage angle.
Karrie attacks after Khufra uses engage or anti-dash cooldowns.
failureCases: Khufra catches Karrie before she stacks damage.
Karrie attacks from a predictable angle without frontline.

reasons: Lunox can punish Khufra after his engage tools are spent.
Her defensive timing helps her survive if Khufra fails to lock her before she responds.

proof.summary: Khufra is strongest during his engage and anti-dash window, while Lunox can use defensive timing and burst to punish him after that window.
worksBestWhen: Lunox waits out Khufra's main crowd-control commit.
Lunox positions where Khufra cannot instantly wall-stun her.
failureCases: Khufra catches Lunox before she can activate defensive timing.
Lunox uses defensive timing or mobility too early.

reasons: Dyrroth can reduce Khufra's physical defense and make him easier to burst.
This is strongest in skirmishes where Dyrroth can reach Khufra without being chain-controlled.

proof.summary: Khufra wants to soak damage as a frontline tank, while Dyrroth's defense reduction makes that frontline role easier to punish.
worksBestWhen: Dyrroth times burst after reducing defense.
Dyrroth avoids committing while Khufra's full control chain is ready.
failureCases: Khufra locks Dyrroth before Dyrroth completes his damage window.
Dyrroth dives too far without follow-up.
